message:
fix(mvcc): remove spurious .unwrap() on parking_lot::Mutex::lock()

parking_lot::Mutex::lock() returns the guard directly (not Result),
so calling .unwrap() on it is a compile error. This fixes 14 test
compilation errors in the lab scheduler tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
